inputs.label: Available Work Time per Shift (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Total planned production time per shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned production time per shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.

inputs.label: Customer Demand per Shift (units)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units required by the customer per shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units required by the customer per shift.

inputs.label: Actual Cycle Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Measured average time to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured average time to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck operation.

inputs.label: Average Changeover Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Time required to switch from one product variant to another, including setup and adjustments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required to switch from one product variant to another, including setup and adjustments.

inputs.label: Average Batch Size (units)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.

inputs.label: Direct Labor Cost per Hour ($)
inputs.businessContext: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production operators.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production operators.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., supervision, utilities, maintenance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., supervision, utilities, maintenance).

inputs.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; used to quantify demand uncertainty.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; used to quantify demand uncertainty.

inputs.label: Flexibility Strategy
inputs.businessContext: Production strategy to handle demand variability: mixed-model (quick changeovers), dedicated lines (fixed product lines), chase demand (vary capacity), or level schedule (stable production with inventory).

businessContext_i18n.en: Production strategy to handle demand variability: mixed-model (quick changeovers), dedicated lines (fixed product lines), chase demand (vary capacity), or level schedule (stable production with inventory).

rules.message: Cycle time exceeds takt time. Production cannot meet demand without overtime or additional capacity.
Batch size must be positive when changeover time is greater than zero.
Demand variability coefficient should be between 0 and 2.

thresholds.message: Takt utilization exceeds 95%. Risk of missed deliveries; consider capacity increase or demand smoothing.
Flexibility cost per unit exceeds 10% of direct labor cost per unit. Review changeover reduction initiatives.
